tasks.label: Build hledger-web
args: command -v stack >/dev/null 2>&1 && stack install hledger-web || (echo "Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install" && exit 1)
where stack >nul 2>&1 && stack install hledger-web || (echo Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install && exit /b 1)

command -v stack >/dev/null 2>&1 && stack install hledger-web || (echo "Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install" && exit 1)

command -v stack >/dev/null 2>&1 && stack install hledger-web || (echo "Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install" && exit 1)

tasks.label: Check Stack Installation
args: command -v stack || echo 'Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install'
where stack || echo Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install
command -v stack || echo 'Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install'
